# Wrapped paragraphs

ZEBRA01 begins this normal prose paragraph, which is deliberately long enough to
wrap across several lines on the device so that word-wrap boundaries can be
measured from the highlight rectangles, and it ends with the token ZEBRA02 that
should land far enough down to reveal the line height between wrapped lines.

iii iii iii iii iii iii iii iii iii iii iii iii iii iii iii iii ZEBRA03 iii iii
iii iii iii iii iii iii iii iii iii iii iii iii iii iii iii iii iii iii ZEBRA04
iii iii iii iii iii iii iii iii iii iii iii iii iii iii iii iii iii iii iii iii.

mmm mmm mmm mmm mmm mmm mmm mmm ZEBRA05 mmm mmm mmm mmm mmm mmm mmm mmm mmm mmm
mmm mmm mmm mmm mmm mmm ZEBRA06 mmm mmm mmm mmm mmm mmm mmm mmm mmm mmm mmm mmm.

ZEBRA07 0123456789 0123456789 0123456789 0123456789 0123456789 0123456789
0123456789 0123456789 0123456789 0123456789 0123456789 ZEBRA08 0123456789 0123.

Punctuation-heavy: it's a "test," (really!) — semicolons; colons: and, of
course, ZEBRA09 lots... of? ellipses—dashes—and parentheses (nested (deeply))
to see whether ZEBRA10 the wrap engine treats punctuation advances correctly.
